response: People with braces are dental appliances designed to correct misaligned teeth and jaws. They have no connection to gravitational forces or the ability to manipulate them. The concept of manipulating gravity at will is currently beyond the realm of scientific understanding and technological capability. Braces do not provide any physical or metaphysical power related to gravity. Therefore, the inability of people with braces to manipulate gravity at will stems from a lack of scientific basis and physical capability. This limitation highlights a fundamental weakness.
